description_for_human: Faceless side-business system for employed professionals — 5 AI tools to validate, launch, and grow anonymous micro-SaaS revenue without quitting your job.
description_for_model: Faceless side-business system for employed professionals — a membership platform of five AI tools that build anonymous micro-SaaS recurring revenue without quitting your job, writing code, or revealing your identity. Includes: freedom number calculator, idea validator with 500+ micro-SaaS ideas, stealth ops hub for legal compliance, launch automation, and faceless audience builder. Pricing from $0.97/month.
